sections.description: AI-powered CSS/JS asset scanner for WordPress.
sections.changelog: Version 1.7.63b (beta): Removes the redundant 'External URLs scanned — rules can only be downloaded' notice on external-only scans that produced 0 rules (the Download button is already dormant on 0-rule scans). Carries 1.7.62b (Include-URLs carry-over fix), 1.7.61b (Rescan-ET button styling) and 1.7.60b (results-table polish).
